metric_caveats: Full fixed ExECTv2 validation split with local Qwen3.6:35b; not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
S1 fields only: diagnosis, seizure_type, annotated_medication.
The variant combines v4.11 seizure label policy with the promoted annotated-medication non-ASM/brand alias guard.
No optimizer, ChainOfThought remains the existing direct field-family module, and scorer semantics are unchanged.
Compare against S1 v4.10 Qwen full, S1 v4.11 Qwen full, S2/S3 clean-ladder Qwen full, and S5 v2b Qwen full.
